MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Christopher Gar Jun Tam is present.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Donart Arthur Young and Ana Uy are present.
Attorney Anand Parik representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-15-2013 remains on calendar. JPT David Yang, Clerk M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
